creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
graphics/vigra installs lib/libvigraimpex.so.3.171, is that right?
Shouldn't that be lib/libvigraimpex.a ?

editors/libreoffice fails to build because it's searching for lib/libvigraimpex.a, but file doesn't exist.

So either libreoffice port, or vigra port (most likely) must be fixed.
